meta.note: 旧道具面板模板已重构为当前 5-设计/道具/3-生成 的多视图主体设计图模板。

source.source_design_doc: projects/aigc/<项目名>/5-设计/道具/2-设计/<主体名称>.md
source.reference_image: projects/aigc/<项目名>/5-设计/道具/3-生成/<主体名称>-主图.png

output.output_image: projects/aigc/<项目名>/5-设计/道具/3-生成/<主体名称>-多视图.png
output.output_prompt_json: projects/aigc/<项目名>/5-设计/道具/3-生成/<主体名称>-多视图.json

reference_images: projects/aigc/<项目名>/5-设计/道具/3-生成/<主体名称>-主图.png

layout.background: neutral dark warm gray production-board background

view_modules.description: Large main three-quarter view matching the reference image.
Front, side, back, and top or functional angle views, all showing the same prop identity.
Close-up cells for material, joints, wear, markings, moving parts, seals, edges, or functional affordance.
Non-human scale or usage cues such as table edge, tile size, measurement ticks, pedestal contact shadow, or opened/closed state.

critical_requirements: Use the corresponding prop/subject design document's Prompt Design section as the primary source of truth.
Use the single-subject main image as the visual reference anchor for silhouette, proportions, materials, color, wear, and identifying details.
Create one prop multiview subject design sheet, not a poster, not a product advertisement, and not a collection of different objects.
All views must depict the same prop identity with stable morphology, scale logic, material aging, construction details, and narrative function.
Layout instructions organize views only; they must not override the upstream design document or redesign the prop.
No people, no hands, no dominant character figures, no unrelated scene takeover.
If exact text rendering is unreliable, reserve clean label areas for post-production overlay instead of hallucinating labels.
prompt_payload.negative_prompt: different object in each view, character takeover, hands holding the prop, product lineup, luxury advertisement, unrelated poster scene, redesigned silhouette, invented ornaments, inconsistent material, extra parts not present in the source design
